name: 雙重身份懸念
description: 在女主身份反差建立後，立刻揭露男主也在隱藏身份——假裝流浪漢的史塔克集團總裁。雙重隱藏身份讓觀眾的期待加倍：不僅期待女主身份揭露的爽感，還期待男主身份揭露時所有人的震驚反應。

examples.drama_title: [FULL HD] She Married a Homeless CEO?! | Full Mini Drama HD | Romantic Comedy Series
examples.excerpt: Boss, you keep pretending to be homeless to scare off your future fianceé. Mrs. Stark is threatening to disown you. / Okay, I'm not even that into her. If it wasn't for the bidding conference, I would have never even shown my face. Tell mother the only girl I'll marry is a girl of my destiny.
